status.title: Status
status.description: Transformation status: success, partial_success, or failed

input_rows_total.title: Input Rows
input_rows_total.description: Total number of rows in input data

input_columns.title: Input Columns
input_columns.description: List of column names in input data

output_rows.title: Output Rows
output_rows.description: Number of rows in transformed output

output_columns.title: Output Columns
output_columns.description: List of column names in output data

output_file.title: Output File
output_file.description: Filename of exported data in Key-Value Store

output_preview.title: Output Preview
output_preview.description: First 10 rows of transformed data (JSON array)

output_data.title: Output Data
output_data.description: Full transformed data as JSON array (only if < 10MB). Use this for API integrations.

generation_info.title: Generation Info
generation_info.description: LLM code generation details (provider, tokens, time, attempts)

generated_code.title: Generated Code
generated_code.description: Python/Polars code generated for the transformation. Reusable in your own projects.
